back

WebParameter.Name: FormatString
WebParameter.Value:
<style type="text/css">
            /* menu styles */
            #jsddm
            {
padding: 10;
    margin: 10px 0 0 35px;
background: url(/Templates/mockup/images/n_menu_bg.jpg) no-repeat;
height: 40px;
    width: 790px;
float: left;
text-align: center;
            }
            #jsddm li
            {
                float: left;
                list-style: none;
                font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
display: inline;
            }
            #jsddm li a
            {
                display: block;
padding: 15px 25px;
                text-decoration: none;
                border-right: 1px solid white;

color: #626161;
                white-space: nowrap;
            }
            #jsddm li a:hover
            {
                /* background: #24313C;*/
            }
            #jsddm li ul
            {
margin-top: -5px;
                padding: 0;
                position: absolute;
                visibility: hidden;
                border-top: 1px solid white;
            }
            #jsddm li ul li
            {
                float: none;
                display: inline;
            }
            #jsddm li ul li a
            {
                width: auto;
                background: #edeae1;
                color: #24313C;
            }
            #jsddm li ul li a:hover
            {
                background: #dfdbd0;
            }        
</style>

<script type="text/javascript">
            var timeout = 500;
            var closetimer = 0;
            var ddmenuitem = 0;

            function jsddm_open() {
                jsddm_canceltimer();
                jsddm_close();
                ddmenuitem = $(this).find('ul').eq(0).css('visibility', 'visible');
            }

            function jsddm_close()
            { if (ddmenuitem) ddmenuitem.css('visibility', 'hidden'); }

            function jsddm_timer()
            { closetimer = window.setTimeout(jsddm_close, timeout); }

            function jsddm_canceltimer() {
                if (closetimer) {
                    window.clearTimeout(closetimer);
                    closetimer = null;
                } 
            }

            $(document).ready(function() {
                $('#jsddm > li').bind('mouseover', jsddm_open);
                $('#jsddm > li').bind('mouseout', jsddm_timer);
            });

            document.onclick = jsddm_close;
        </script>
$(Content)

WebParameter.Name: ContainerTemplate
WebParameter.Value:
$(SeeAlso)

    In this section:

    $(UpOneLevel)
      $(Content)

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="CalendarId" Value="-1" /> <Parameter Name="BaseGroup" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="DefaultRecipients" Value="" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="QuotaWarningPercentage" Value="85"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="StorageQuota" Value="500MB"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="RootPath" Value="~/Assets/Public/Media-Library/"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="RootText" Value="Library"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="EnableVersioning" Value="true"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="EnableUploadArchiveAndPassword" Value="true"></Parameter> <Parameter Name="PasswordComplexityRequirement"> <Value> <![CDATA[<PasswordComplexityRequirement MinChars="8" RequireLetter="true" RequireNumber="true" />]]> </Value> </Parameter> <Parameter Name="PageSize" Value="30"></Parameter> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="LibraryId" Value="-1" /> <Parameter Name="DownloadUrl" Value="?&" /> <Parameter Name="DisplayUserNamePassword" Value="UserName/Password" /> <Parameter Name="PageSize" Value="999" /> <Parameter Name="DownloadTimeOut" Value="3600000" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="TwitterUserName" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="Width" Value="250" /> <Parameter Name="Height" Value="300" /> <Parameter Name="BackgroundShellColor" Value="#333" /> <Parameter Name="ShellColor" Value="#fff" /> <Parameter Name="TweetsBackgroundColor" Value="#000" /> <Parameter Name="TWeetsColor" Value="#fff" /> <Parameter Name="TweetsLinksColor" Value="#4aed05" /> <Parameter Name="NumberOfTweets" Value="5" /> <Parameter Name="ScrollBar" Value="false" /> <Parameter Name="Loop" Value="false" /> <Parameter Name="Live" Value="false" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: FormatString
WebParameter.Value:
Tweets from our Ministers

$(Content)

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="SignOutRedirect" Value="/Login.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="SignUpUrl" Value="/Register.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="FirstLoginUrl" Value="/Update-My-Profile.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="UpdatePasswordUrl" Value="/Singapore/My-Profile/Update-My-Password.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="LoginHome" Value="/Home.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="EnableOTP" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="EnableSMS" Value="false" /> <Parameter Name="UpdatePasswordUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="ForgotPasswordUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="MembershipCheck" Value="Group1;Group2" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="MakeUpHomeUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="PlaybackHandler" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="AttendanceLogUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="LocaleMakeUpWebHandlerUrl" Value="" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="MakeUpHomeUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="NextPageUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="LocaleMakeUpWebHandlerUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="PlaybackHandler" Value="" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="BaseGroup" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="FullControlList" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="MaxSMS" Value="1" /> <Parameter Name="UseNamePrefix" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="SMS-Template" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="Email-Template" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="EmailSubject-Template" Value="" /> </Parameters>

Make-Up Service: News and Updates

WebParameter.Name: EmptyContentTemplate
WebParameter.Value: There are no news or updates to read. Please proceed with the video playback.

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="Recipients" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="SendTo" Value="SendTos/SendTo/Text|Value" /> <Parameter Name="RequireCode" Value="1" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Value:
<Parameters> <Parameter Name="ItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="FirstItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="SelectedItemTemplate" Value="" />
<Parameter Name="Header" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="BodyTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="Footer" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="Seperator" Value="" />
<Parameter Name="UpOneLevelTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="SeeAlsoTemplate" Value="" />
<Parameter Name="AlternateItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="AlternateParentItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="AlternateRootItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="AlternateSelectedItemTemplate*" Value="" />
<Parameter Name="ParentItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="RootItemTemplate" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="ContainerTemplate" Value="" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: SMS-Template-Rejected
WebParameter.Value: Dear $(MemberFirstName), your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been rejected by $(WorkerName). Reason: "$(Message)" - MCGI Make-Up

WebParameter.Name: Email-Template-Rejected
WebParameter.Value:
Dear $(MemberFirstName),

Your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been rejected by $(WorkerName).

Reason for rejection:
$(Message)


Kindly approach the assigned worker for clarifications.

WebParameter.Name: EmailSubject-Template-Rejected
WebParameter.Value: Your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been rejected

WebParameter.Name: ItemTemplate
WebParameter.Value: $(DateTime) $(Subject)

WebParameter.Name: EmailSubject-Template-Approved
WebParameter.Value: Your attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been approved

WebParameter.Name: EmailSubject-Template-MessageOnly
WebParameter.Value: Message from assigned worker about your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate)

WebParameter.Name: Email-Template-Approved
WebParameter.Value:
Dear $(MemberFirstName),

Your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been approved.

Additional note from $(WorkerName):
$(Message)


Kindly approach the assigned worker for clarifications.

WebParameter.Name: Email-Template-MessageOnly
WebParameter.Value:
Dear $(MemberFirstName),

Your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) is still pending approval.

Message from $(WorkerName):
$(Message)


Kindly approach the assigned worker for clarifications.

WebParameter.Name: SMS-Template-Approved
WebParameter.Value: Dear $(MemberFirstName), your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) has been approved by $(WorkerName). Additional note from assigned worker: "$(Message)" - MCGI Make-Up

WebParameter.Name: SMS-Template-MessageOnly
WebParameter.Value: Dear $(MemberFirstName), your Make-Up attendance on $(MakeUpDate) for $(ServiceType) $(ServiceDate) is still pending approval. Message from assigned worker $(WorkerName): "$(Message)" - MCGI Make-Up

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value:
$(DateTime) $(Subject)

]]> » See All]]>

WebParameter.Name: FormatString
WebParameter.Value: $(Content)

WebParameter.Name: Email-Template
WebParameter.Value:
Dear $(MemberFirstName),

You have requested to reset your MCGI Portal password. Please log in to the Portal and use the below Temporary Password. Once you're logged in, you will be asked to choose a new password according to your preference.

Username: $(Username)
Temporary Password: $(Password)


Kindly contact the ADDCIT team for any issues.

 

Thanks be to GOD!
 MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: SMS-Template
WebParameter.Value: Dear $(MemberFirstName), you have requested a password reset. Your Username is $(Username) and your Temporary Password is $(Password). Please use this to login to MCGI Portal.

WebParameter.Name: Success-Template
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you!


Your Username and Temporary Password have been sent to:

  • E-mail: $(Email)
  • Mobile: $(Mobile)


Click here to Login

WebParameter.Name: AccountCreatedAlert-Email
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you for registering with MCGI Singapore Portal. Please verify your Personal Information listed below:

Personal Information
Church ID No. $(CHURCH_ID_NO)
First Name $(FIRST_NAME)
Last Name $(LAST_NAME)
Date of Membership $(MEMBERSHIP_DATE)
Mobile No. $(MOBILE)
Email $(EMAIL)
User Name (Login) $(USER_NAME)
Temporary Password $(PASSWORD)


Please click the link below to start using your MCGI Portal account. Once you log-in, you will be asked to change your Temporary Password to the one you prefer.

$(URL)


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: NewRegistrationAlertToAdmin-Email
WebParameter.Value:
IMPORTANT: YOUR REVIEW IS REQUIRED!

The MCGI Portal requires your approval to activate this newly created account before the user can access the Portal.
Please verify the Personal Information carefully before approving the account:


Personal Information
Church ID No. $(CHURCH_ID_NO)
First Name $(FIRST_NAME)
Last Name $(LAST_NAME)
Mobile No. $(MOBILE)
Email $(EMAIL)
Home Address $(HOME_ADDRESS)
Date of Membership $(MEMBERSHIP_DATE)
Locale $(LOCALE)
User Name (Login) $(USER_NAME)


Click on the link below and login to MCGI Portal to approve or reject the newly created account.

APPROVAL STEPS:
  1. Login to the Portal by clicking the below link
  2. Switch to Administration view by clicking the Administration link from the Designer Toolbox
  3. On the left navigation, click on Web Parts -> Registration -> Member Link Manager
  4. Locate the user from the list and verify that the Status field is not yet approved
  5. Click on the pencil icon next to the Church ID to edit the status
  6. Click the Approve button

$(URL)


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: AccountApprovedAlert-Email
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you for registering with MCGI Singapore Portal. Your information has been reviewed and approved.

STATUS:  $(APPROVAL_STATUS)

Kindly verify your Personal Information listed below and let us know if there are any discrepancies.


Personal Information
Church ID No. $(CHURCH_ID_NO)
First Name $(FIRST_NAME)
Last Name $(LAST_NAME)
Date of Membership $(MEMBERSHIP_DATE)
Mobile No. $(MOBILE)
Email $(EMAIL)
User Name (Login) $(USER_NAME)
Temporary Password $(PASSWORD)


Click the below link to start using your MCGI Portal account. Once you're logged-in, you will be asked to change your Temporary Password to the one you prefer.

$(URL)


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: AccountCreatedNonAmsAlert-Email
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you for registering with MCGI Singapore Portal. Please verify your Personal Information listed below:

Personal Information
Church ID No. $(CHURCH_ID_NO)
First Name $(FIRST_NAME)
Last Name $(LAST_NAME)
Date of Membership $(MEMBERSHIP_DATE)
Mobile No. $(MOBILE)
Email $(EMAIL)
User Name (Login) $(USER_NAME)
Temporary Password $(PASSWORD)



Please note that your account is still PENDING APPROVAL from the Locale Secretary or Administrator. You will recieve a notification alert when your account is approved.

Once approved, please click the link below to start using your MCGI Portal account. After you log-in, you will be asked to change your Temporary Password to the one you prefer.

$(URL)


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: AccountCreatedAlert-SMS
WebParameter.Value: Hi $(MEMBER_NAME), thank you for registering with MCGI Portal. Your Username is $(USER_NAME) and your Temporary Password is $(PASSWORD). -MCGI Portal

WebParameter.Name: NewRegistrationAlertToAdmin-SMS
WebParameter.Value: Hi, a new MCGI Portal registration without an AMS account requires your approval. Member name: $(FIRST_NAME) $(LAST_NAME). -MCGI Portal

WebParameter.Name: AccountCreatedNonAmsAlert-SMS
WebParameter.Value: Hi $(FIRST_NAME), thank you for registering with MCGI Portal. Your Username is $(USER_NAME) and your Temporary Password is $(PASSWORD). However, your account is currently PENDING APPROVAL from the Locale Secretary or Administrator, please wait for an alert that your account has been approved before you can login. -MCGI Portal

WebParameter.Name: AccountApprovedAlert-SMS
WebParameter.Value: Hi $(FIRST_NAME), your MCGI Portal account has been approved. Your Username is $(USER_NAME) and your Temporary Password is $(PASSWORD). You may now login using your new account. -MCGI Portal

WebParameter.Name: Email-UpdateAlert
WebParameter.Value:
This is an automated alert sent when a ticket is modified or a new ticket is created.

TICKET INFORMATION
ID $(TICKET_GUID)
Description 
$(DESCRIPTION)
Requestor $(SUBMITTED_BY)
Date Submitted $(DATE_CREATED)
Request Category $(CATEGORY)
Request Type $(TYPE)
Urgency $(URGENCY)
Status $(STATUS)
Assigned To $(ASSIGNED_TO)
Support Group $(SUPPORT_GROUP)


$(TICKET_UPDATES)

 
To view the ticket, click the link below:
$(URL)


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebParameter.Name: Email-UpdateAlert-UpdateTable
WebParameter.Value:
$(UPDATE_ROWS)
CHANGES
NAME OLD VALUE NEW VALUE

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="LocaleFilter" Value="1442/Singapore" /> <Parameter Name="LoginUrl" Value="/SingaporeV2/Public/Login.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="Registration-ParameterSet" Value="MCGI-Registration" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="GroupFilter" Value="/Administrators" /> <Parameter Name="UserHomeUrl" Value="/Central/Security/WebUserHome.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="UserEditUrl" Value="/Central/Security/UserProfile.aspx" /> <Parameter Name="Data-Entry" Value="true" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="Title" Value="MCGIsg Sportsfest 2012 - Online Registration" /> <Parameter Name="When" Value="May 17, 2012 (Tuesday)" /> <Parameter Name="Where" Value="ACS Tan Chin Tuan Hall Sports Complex" /> <Parameter Name="Where-Extra" Value="(Meeting place at Locale @ 8AM)" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Where
WebParameter.Value: ACS Tan Chin Tuan Hall Sports Complex

WebParameter.Name: Email-Template
WebParameter.Value:
To $(RECIPIENT)

 
$(MESSAGE)



-From: $(FROM)

WebParameter.Name: Vote-SMS-Template
WebParameter.Value: Hi $(FIRST_NAME), thank you for your vote! You have voted "$(CANDIDATE_ENTRY) by $(CANDIDATE_NAME)" with the voting code $(VOTING_CODE). This serves as your entry for the lucky dip.

WebParameter.Name: Vote-Email-Template
WebParameter.Value:
Hi $(FIRST_NAME), thank you for voting!

SONG: $(CANDIDATE_ENTRY), $(CANDIDATE_NAME)
DATE: $(DATE_VOTED)

 

This serves as your entry to the lucky dip.

- ASOP Organizers

WebParameter.Name: Vote-Email-Confirm-Template
WebParameter.Value:
Hi $(FIRST_NAME), thank you for voting!

SONG: $(CANDIDATE_ENTRY), $(CANDIDATE_NAME)
DATE: $(DATE_VOTED)

 

You need to confirm your email address for your vote to be counted. To confirm, please click the below link or copy it into your browser's address bar and press enter:

$(CONFIRM_LINK)

This serves as your entry to the lucky dip.

- ASOP Organizers

WebParameter.Name: Vote-Email-Confirm-Subject
WebParameter.Value: [MCGI] Hi $(FIRST_NAME), thank you for voting $(CANDIDATE_ENTRY), please confirm your email...

WebParameter.Name: SendTo
WebParameter.Value: <SendTos> <SendTo Text="Daniel Salunga" Value="daniel.salunga@mcgi.org.sg" /> <SendTo Text="Anderson So" Value="anderson.so@mcgi.org.sg" /> </SendTos>

WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="ThumbSize" Value="200" /> <Parameter Name="PhotoSize" Value="600" /> <Parameter Name="ReturnUrl" Value="/" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: BeforeUpdateWithEmailNote
WebParameter.Value:
NOTE: Your password will be updated for the following services:

  • Music Ministry Portal
  • MCGI E-mail (@mcgi.org.sg)

WebParameter.Name: SuccessUpdateWithEmailNote
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you! Your password has been updated for the following services:

  • Music Ministry Portal
  • MCGI E-mail (@mcgi.org.sg)

 

Home

WebParameter.Name: SuccessUpdateNote
WebParameter.Value: Thank you! Your password has been updated.

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="SignOutRedirect" Value="/Login/" /> <Parameter Name="SignUpUrl" Value="/Register/" /> <Parameter Name="FirstLoginUrl" Value="/Update-My-Profile/" /> <Parameter Name="UpdatePasswordUrl" Value="/My-Profile/Update-My-Password/" /> <Parameter Name="LoginHomeUrl" Value="/" /> <Parameter Name="EnableOTP" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="EnableSMS" Value="false" /> <Parameter Name="EnableExternalAccounts" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="UpdatePasswordUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="ForgotPasswordUrl" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="MembershipCheck" Value="Group1;Group2" /> <Parameter Name="RememberMeText" Value="Keep me logged in (this is a private computer)" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="VotingEnded" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="LimitedMode" Value="true" /> <Parameter Name="EventTitle" Value="ASOP Asia & Oceania Division Eliminations- People's Choice Nominations" /> <Parameter Name="ShortEventTitle" Value="ASOP Asia & Oceania Division Elimination - People's Choice Nominations" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="DoneUrl" Value="/Vote/" /> <Parameter Name="ResultsUrl" Value="/Vote-Results/" /> <Parameter Name="EventTitle" Value="ASOP Asia Oceania Division Elimination - People's Choice Nomination" /> <Parameter Name="ShortEventTitle" Value="ASOP Asia Oceania Division Elimination - People's Choice Nomination" /> <Parameter Name="EventInfoContent" Value="" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value: <Parameters> <Parameter Name="TermsAndAgreementContent" Value="" /> <Parameter Name="TermsCancelUrl" Value="/" /> <Parameter Name="PhotoRequired" Value="true" /> </Parameters>

WebParameter.Name: TermsAndAgreementContent
WebParameter.Value:
Usage Terms and Conditions

 

Welcome to ADDMUSICMINISTRY.ORG. If you continue to browse and use this website, you are agreeing to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use, which together with our privacy policy govern MUSIC MINISTRY CORE’S  relationship with you in relation to this website. If you disagree with any part of these terms and conditions, please do not use our website.

The term ‘ADD MUSIC MINISTRY Portal’ or ‘us’ or ‘we’ refers to the owner of the website whose registered office is ADD Convention Center, Sampaloc Street, Apalit, Pampanga, Philippines. The term ‘you’ refers to the user or viewer of our website.

The use of this website is subject to the following terms of use:

  • The content of the pages of this website is for your general information and use only. It is subject to change without notice.
  • This website uses cookies to monitor browsing preferences. Cookies must be enabled.
  • Neither we nor any third parties provide any warranty or guarantee as to the accuracy, timeliness, performance, completeness or suitability of the information and materials found or offered on this website for any particular purpose. You acknowledge that such information and materials may contain inaccuracies or errors and we expressly exclude liability for any such inaccuracies or errors to the fullest extent permitted by law.
  • Your use of any information or materials on this website is entirely at your own risk, for which we shall not be liable. It shall be your own responsibility to ensure that any products, services or information available through this website meet your specific requirements.
  • This website contains material which is owned by or licensed to us. This material includes, but is not limited to, the design, layout, look, appearance and graphics. Reproduction is prohibited other than in accordance with the copyright notice, which forms part of these terms and conditions.
  • All trademarks reproduced in this website, which are not the property of, or licensed to the operator, are acknowledged on the website.
  • Unauthorised use of this website may give rise to a claim for damages and/or be a criminal offence.
  • From time to time, this website may also include links to other websites. These links are provided for your convenience to provide further information. They do not signify that we endorse the website(s). We have no responsibility for the content of the linked website(s).
  • Your use of this website and any dispute arising out of such use of the website is subject to the laws of Singapore.

 

Copyright Notice

 

This website and its content is copyright of ADD Music Ministry Portal - © MCGI 2012. All rights reserved.

Any redistribution or reproduction of part or all of the contents in any form is prohibited other than the following:

  • You may print or download to a local hard disk extracts for your personal and non-commercial use only
  • You may copy the content to individual third parties for their personal use, but only if you acknowledge the website as the source of the material

You may not, except with our express written permission, distribute or commercially exploit the content. Nor may you transmit it or store it in any other website or other form of electronic retrieval system.

WebParameter.Name: Parameter-Schema
WebParameter.Value:
Thank you for reaching us.
Your inquiry is being attended and an email reply will be sent to you as soon as possible.
]]>

WebParameter.Name: CannotResetONEAccountNote
WebParameter.Value:
Cannot perform a password reset on your MCGI ONE account. Please perform the password reset via the MCGI ONE website.
Continue to MCGI ONE

WebParameter.Name: UpdateNotSupportedNote
WebParameter.Value:
NOTE: Please update your ONE Password via the MCGI ONE website.


Continue to MCGI ONE

WebParameter.Name: PreLoginNote
WebParameter.Value:
Note!

In the near future, Music Ministry Portal will be requiring all users to use their MCGI ONE account for login. Existing Portal users without ONE account or their Portal account not yet linked to their ONE account will be required to create a ONE account and link it to their Portal account. To register a ONE account, please click the Register menu.

If you already have a ONE account, kindly start using it now.

WebParameter.Name: FormatString
WebParameter.Value:
Talk about ASOP

$(Content)

WebParameter.Name: _ReplyEmailTemplate
WebParameter.Value:
Name: $(Name)

Email: $(Email)

Subject: $(Subject)


Message:
$(Message)

WebParameter.Name: PageTagline
WebParameter.Value: Drop a message. Join the ASOP fever!
